name: Buffer Overflow Risk
message: Unsafe function 'gets' detected. Risk of buffer overflow.
suggestion: Use 'fgets' instead of 'gets' to specify buffer size.

name: Unsafe Input Validation
suggestion: Use a width specifier in scanf (e.g., '%19s') or use 'fgets'.

name: Nested Loops Performance
description: Detects deeply nested loops (3 or more).
message: Deeply nested loops detected. Potential performance issue.
suggestion: Consider refactoring to reduce nesting or use more efficient data structures.
